Trade & Policy.title: Russia x Ukraine ceasefire by end of 2026?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Market prices 74% odds the conflict continues through 2026. Black Sea grain corridors remain a wild card for global wheat and corn supply; Ukraine has historically accounted for roughly 10% of world wheat exports when corridors are open.

Trade & Policy.title: Russia x Ukraine ceasefire by June 30, 2026?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Market prices 92% odds the conflict continues through 2026. Black Sea grain corridors remain a wild card for global wheat and corn supply; Ukraine has historically accounted for roughly 10% of world wheat exports when corridors are open.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $120 in April?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (8% odds) on crude reach $120. Closes in 3d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $200 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (6% odds) on crude reach $200. Closes in ~2mo. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $70 in April?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (2% odds) on crude drop below $70. Closes in 3d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $100 in April?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Market pricing 62% odds crude will reach $100. Closes in 3d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $115 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Near coin-flip odds (54% YES) crude reach $115. Closes in ~2mo. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $70 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Lower-probability outcome (30%) that crude drop below $70. Closes in ~2mo. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Economy & Markets.title: Will no Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: 39% odds of a rate cut. Lower rates reduce operating loan and land interest carrying cost -- historically supportive of commodity prices via weaker dollar.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the June 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 1% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will 6 Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: 1% odds of a rate cut. Lower rates reduce operating loan and land interest carrying cost -- historically supportive of commodity prices via weaker dollar.

Economy & Markets.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the June 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 92% YES on this outcome.

Other.title: Will Silver (XAGUSD) hit (LOW) $60 in April?
Other.why_it_matters: Reflects conditions that can affect agricultural commodity prices, input costs, or farm policy.
